name: jalabs/module-sym-search
description: Semantic hybrid search for Magento 2 on top of Mirasvit Search Ultimate — adds OpenSearch k-NN vector retrieval blended with BM25 keyword search, with pluggable cloud embedding providers (OpenAI, Gemini, Voyage).

suggest.mirasvit/module-search-ultimate: Designed to run on top of Mirasvit Search Ultimate (tested with 2.6.x); the hybrid query plugin layers on top of Mirasvit's keyword ranking. Without it the module still works against the stock OpenSearch engine.
